about.title: Making Sense of the World, Building Things Along the Way
about.description: I believe understanding the world should lead us toward a more self-aware embrace of bias. Taste is bias. Judgment is bias. Creation is the act of slowly inscribing those biases into the world. The world, after all, has horns.
